member.name: M:Bladex.Garantias.Infrastructure.RepositoryFramework.RepositoryFactory.GetRepository``2(Bladex.Garantias.Infrastructure.IUnitOfWork)
member.summary: Gets or creates an instance of the requested interface. Once a repository is created and initialized, it is cached, and all future requests for the repository will come from the cache.
member.typeparam: The interface of the repository to create.
The type of the EntityBase that the repository is for.
member.param: The unit of work that the repository will be participating in.
member.returns: An instance of the interface requested.

member.name: M:Bladex.Garantias.Infrastructure.RepositoryFramework.RepositoryFactory.GetRepository``2
member.summary: Gets or creates an instance of the requested interface. Once a repository is created and initialized, it is cached, and all future requests for the repository will come from the cache.
member.typeparam: The interface of the repository to create.
The type of the EntityBase that the repository is for.
member.returns: An instance of the interface requested.
